gates.advisor: Use only for a bounded strategic advisor call.
gates.large-repo: Use when worktree or repository I/O needs an explicit strategy.
gates.parallel: Use only after independent write scopes are proven.
gates.root-cause: Use for bug fixes, regressions, or repeated failed fixes.
gates.spec: Use for ambiguous product, API, UX, or data-model direction.
gates.spark: Use when persistent Spark routing evidence is required in the card.
gates.tdd: Use when red/green evidence is acceptance-critical.
